name: Lemon and Garlic Chicken with Spring Market Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 whole young chicken, about 3 1/4 to 3 pounds
2 large lemons, juice and zest reserved
1/2 pound baby carrots with green tops attached
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1/8-ths, separating the wings, legs, thighs, and breasts. Season the chicken parts with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the olive oil in a saute pan over medium heat. Add the chicken, skin side down, and brown well before turning to brown the meat side. When the chicken is well browned, add the onions and cook until golden brown. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute. Add lemon juice and white wine, bring quickly to a boil, reduce heat to a low simmer, cover the pan with a tight-fitting lid, and cook for 5 to 8 minutes.
3. Add 1 cup of chicken stock and continue to cook, covered, for an additional 15 minutes, or until the chicken is completely cooked. If the pan dries out too quickly, add more chicken stock.
4. While the chicken is cooking, peel the carrots and place them in a saucepan with 1/4 cup water and a tablespoon of butter. Season with salt and pepper and cook over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes, then set aside.
5. Wash the asparagus and cut off any woody stems attached. Put the asparagus into a pot with 1/4 cup water and a tablespoon of butter and salt and pepper. Cook over low heat for 2 minutes and set aside.
6. When the chicken is fully cooked, remove from the saute pan and place on a platter. Carefully ladle off any grease that has accumulated in the stock and swirl in the remaining 3 tablespoons of butter to give a smooth, silky finish.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
